allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lines=sys.stdin.readlines\(\); [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\)[:500] if isinstance\(json.loads\(l\).get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\), str\) else str\(json.loads\(l\).get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\)\)[:500]\) for l in lines]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: data = json.loads\(line\) content = data.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(c['text'][:800]\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) > 10: print\(content[:800]\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: data = json.loads\(line\) content = data.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(c['text'][:1200]\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) > 10: print\(content[:1200]\) except: pass ")
